name: Potato-Garlic Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Place the potato cubes in a 3-quart saucepan.
3. Add water to cover the potatoes.
4. Simmer until tender, about 25 minutes.
5. Drain well.
6. Mash the potatoes until smooth.
7. Add garlic puree, butter, and enough hot milk or cream to form a smooth mixture.
8. Whip until fluffy.
9. Add salt and pepper.
10. Serve immediately.
